## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between RAMP Holdings and growthx.ai to discuss SEO performance and content progress.](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GSC data anomalies: Widespread issues affecting all clients, with unreliable data since last Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Significant traffic drop (\~42% lost 5+ positions) despite unchanged rankings; possible seasonality](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Content progress: Vendor pages delivered, bank articles delayed to Monday, blog refresh pending](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

## Topics

### GSC Data Anomalies

  - [Widespread issues affecting all clients since last Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Data not refreshing quickly; showed near-zero clicks as of yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [50%+ overnight increase in impressions for blog pages (likely inaccurate)](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Large discrepancies between local data and GSC, with GSC data changing day-to-day](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Luke: "Search Console data in the last month or longer has been so insanely unreliable"](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Expense Category Pages Performance

  - [Significant drop in traffic confirmed by both GSC and RAMP's internal data](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [GSC shows 42% of pages lost \~5 positions, 30% lost 2-5 positions](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Biggest hits: PCP pills, software subscription, IRS ads payment, robots](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Luke suggests possible seasonality: "We did see, like, a traffic reduction last year as well"](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Team to investigate further if trend continues next week](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Performance & Progress

  - [Blog pages: Impressions and clicks within expected range](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Unusual spike in impressions, clicks stable](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Underperforming due to keyword/search intent mismatch](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Positive bump in performance (to be confirmed next week)](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Latest batch of vendor pages delivered to Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Bank fact articles delayed to Monday due to technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [13 bank articles in progress](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Cannibalization Check

  - [Victoria inquired about workflows to check for cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Vivek to check internally and follow up](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Monitor GSC data issues and re-evaluate next week for more accurate insights](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Investigate expense category page traffic drop if trend continues](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Victoria to update status for next batch of vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [growthx.ai to deliver bank fact articles by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - Ali to provide list of blogs for refresh
  - [Vivek to follow up on cannibalization check workflows](https://fathom.video/share/swYyTqCRapy7pJsBzy4yL6KbJ6Yicwxz?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
